# PEITHO

### Documenation

<https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/>

### Release notes (Changelog)

See the latest release notes in
[NEWS.md](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/NEWS.md)

## How to use this Package

Refer to the
[vignette](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/articles/peitho_workflow_basics.html)
for a description of the usage of the PEITHO package. You can find it in
the [Documentation](#documenation) above.

## Notes for developers

### Documentation Updates

When adding information to the *help* sites, *docstrings* or the
*vignette* of this package, please update documentation locally as
follows. The documentation of the main branch is build automatically via
github action.

``` r

devtools::document() # or CTRL + SHIFT + D in RStudio
devtools::build_site()
```

### Local Docker Container

When testing with a local docker container, please make sure to rebuild
the docker image after changes in the R code or dependencies. You can do
this from the root of the repository via:

``` bash
docker build -t peitho-app:latest .
```

After that, start the container as usual via:

``` bash
docker run -p 3838:3838 peitho-app:latest
```

and access the app in your browser at `http://localhost:3838/`. Stop the
container with `CTRL + C` in the terminal.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_step()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/add_step.md)
  : Add a step to a workflow
- [`add_step(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/add_step.workflow.md)
  : Add a new step to the workflow
- [`as.commands_record()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.commands_record.md)
  : Convert an object to commands.json record format
- [`as.commands_record(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.commands_record.workflow.md)
  : Convert a workflow object to commands.json record format
- [`as.commands_record(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.commands_record.workflowstep.md)
  : Convert a workflowstep to commands.json record format
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.data.frame.workflow.md)
  : Convert a workflow object to a data frame
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<workflowrun>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.data.frame.workflowrun.md)
  : Convert a workflowrun object to a data frame
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<workflowstate>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.data.frame.workflowstate.md)
  : Convert a workflowstate to a data frame
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/as.data.frame.workflowstep.md)
  : Convert a workflowstep to a data frame
- [`config()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/config.md)
  : Load PEITHO configuration
- [`fetch_WebText()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/fetch_WebText.md)
  : Fetch and parse web text from a URL
- [`get_field()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/get_field.md)
  : Get a specific field
- [`get_field(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/get_field.workflow.md)
  : Get a specific field from a workflow
- [`get_field(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/get_field.workflowstep.md)
  : Get a specific field from a workflowstep
- [`import_workflow()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/import_workflow.md)
  : Import workflow from a ZIP file
- [`inputs_table_server()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/inputs_table_server.md)
  : Inputs Table Server
- [`inputs_table_ui()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/inputs_table_ui.md)
  : Inputs Table UI
- [`new_WebText()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_WebText.md)
  : WebText Class Represents text content fetched from a web page.
- [`new_operationparam()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_operationparam.md)
  : Create a new operation parameter object
- [`new_workflow()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_workflow.md)
  : Create a new workflow object
- [`new_workflowrun()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_workflowrun.md)
  : Workflow run object
- [`new_workflowstate()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_workflowstate.md)
  : Create a new workflow state object
- [`new_workflowstep()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_workflowstep.md)
  : Create a new workflow step object
- [`new_workflowsteprun()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/new_workflowsteprun.md)
  : Create a new workflow step run object
- [`` `%||%` ``](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/null-coalescing-operator.md)
  : Null coalescing operator Returns left value if not NULL, otherwise
  right value.
- [`print(`*`<operationparam>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.operationparam.md)
  : Print method for operationparam objects
- [`print(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.workflow.md)
  : Print method for workflow objects
- [`print(`*`<workflowrun>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.workflowrun.md)
  : Print method for workflowrun objects
- [`print(`*`<workflowstate>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.workflowstate.md)
  : Print method for workflowstate objects
- [`print(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.workflowstep.md)
  : Print method for workflowstep objects
- [`print(`*`<workflowsteprun>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/print.workflowsteprun.md)
  : Print method for workflowsteprun objects
- [`remove_step()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/remove_step.md)
  : Remove a step from a workflow
- [`remove_step(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/remove_step.workflow.md)
  : Remove a step from the workflow
- [`results_table_server()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/results_table_server.md)
  : Results Table Server Module
- [`results_table_ui()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/results_table_ui.md)
  : Results Table UI Module
- [`run()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/run.md) :
  Run a workflow step
- [`run(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/run.workflow.md)
  : Run the entire workflow
- [`run(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/run.workflowstep.md)
  : Run a workflow step
- [`save_as_zip()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/save_as_zip.md)
  : Save an object as a ZIP file
- [`save_as_zip(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/save_as_zip.workflow.md)
  : Save workflow as a ZIP file
- [`startApplication()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/startApplication.md)
  : Start Application
- [`summary(`*`<workflowsteprun>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/summary.workflowsteprun.md)
  : Summary method for workflowsteprun objects
- [`update()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update.md)
  : Update an object
- [`update(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update.workflow.md)
  : Update a workflow step with a new value
- [`update(`*`<workflowstate>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update.workflowstate.md)
  : Add a workflow step run to the workflow state
- [`update(`*`<workflowstep>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update.workflowstep.md)
  : Update a workflow step
- [`update_input_list()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update_input_list.md)
  : Update the input list of a workflow
- [`update_input_list(`*`<workflow>`*`)`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/update_input_list.workflow.md)
  : Update the input list of a workflow
- [`workflow_file_paths()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_file_paths.md)
  : Helper to get file paths for PEITHO workflow files
- [`workflow_files_server()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_files_server.md)
  : Workflow Files Server
- [`workflow_files_ui()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_files_ui.md)
  : Workflow Files UI
- [`workflow_steps_from_files()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_steps_from_files.md)
  : Extract workflow steps from files in a folder
- [`workflow_table_server()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_table_server.md)
  : Workflow Table Server
- [`workflow_table_ui()`](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/reference/workflow_table_ui.md)
  : Workflow Table UI

  Execution](https://pandora-isomemo.github.io/PEITHO/articles/peitho_workflow_basics.md):
